name: filters
description: Filter UI tests for list pages — set "route" to a filterable list page in your project before generating

testCases.name: filter panel is visible on the list page
steps: Navigate to the filterable list page
Wait for list items and filter controls to render
assertions: Filter panel or filter controls are visible
At least one filter option is present

testCases.name: applying a filter updates the list results
steps: Navigate to the filterable list page
Use detectFilters(page) from utils/filter-tester.js to verify filters exist — skip if none found
Record the initial item count or text of the first visible item
Click or select the first available filter option (use data-testid, getByRole, or getByLabel — never click by raw text)
Wait for the list to update
assertions: Item count or content changes after filter is applied
URL reflects the active filter if the filter is URL-based (query param or path segment)

testCases.name: clearing a filter restores the full list
steps: Navigate to the filterable list page
Click the reset or clear button, or deselect the active filter option
Wait for the list to restore
assertions: All items are visible again after clearing the filter

testCases.name: full filter suite passes
steps: Navigate to the filterable list page
Use testFilters(page, config) from utils/filter-tester.js for the full filter suite
assertions: Applying each filter option updates the results
Clearing filters restores the original list
